3165850.name: Squad Weapon Skins - Contractors Pack
3165850.description:
Weapon skins are cosmetic items grounded in reality that don’t impact gameplay.

Skins can be equipped only by certain factions and are biome-restricted to keep gameplay authentic.

This pack contains 8 cosmetic items for WPMC faction:
  • Desert Wolf - AK-101 PushCo Assault Rifle for desert maps
  • Forest Wolf - AK-101 PushCo Assault Rifle for woodland maps

  • Desert Viper- All M4 Wormpool Carbine and M16 Wormpool Assault Rifle variants for desert maps
  • Forest Viper - All M4 Wormpool Carbine and M16 Wormpool Assault Rifle variants for woodland maps

  • Desert Bull - M4 Simon Offense Carbine for desert maps
  • Forest Bull - M4 Simon Offense Carbine for woodland maps

  • Desert Trophy - G17 Pistol for for desert maps
  • Forest Trophy - G17 Pistol for for woodland maps

These items can be equipped on the Customize screen which can be accessed from the Main Menu.
3165850.supported_languages:
英语*, 简体中文*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 已启用 Valve 反作弊保护
